site.name: Mathieu Châles — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Mathieu Châles, junior fullstack developer based in Paris. Career-switcher from woodworking, graduating from La Capsule. Looking for a full-time role or internship.

profile.bioIntro: Yesterday I was shaping wood. Today I write code.
profile.bioTagline: Always to build things that serve a purpose.
bioParagraphs: Mechanical engineer by training, I went on to coordinate international science programmes — team management, project leadership, communicating complex content to diverse audiences. Then I worked wood, because building something concrete with your hands has always felt essential to me.
Today I write code. And I find in development what has always driven me: analyse a problem, design a solution that holds, ship it.

I graduated from La Capsule's fullstack bootcamp in 2026 and code in TypeScript — React / Next.js on the web, React Native on mobile, Node.js on the server. I'm looking for a full-time role or internship in the Paris area (hybrid), with a team that takes the time to do things right.

formation.heading: Education
formation.bootcampName: La Capsule — Fullstack Web & Mobile Bootcamp
formation.description: Intensive fullstack web and mobile development training. Real projects, teamwork, professional pace.
formation.stack: React · Next.js · React Native · Node.js · Express · MongoDB · TypeScript · Git
formation.engineeringName: Mechanical & Production Engineering Degree — ISEL-ITII / SUPii
formation.engineeringDescription: Multidisciplinary programme focused on mechanics, production and industrial logistics. Completed in work-study at Renault — optimising test protocols, coordinating between technical teams and cross-functional departments.

alterago.title: AlterAgo
alterago.description: A mobile app that gamifies daily routines to help seniors stay motivated, through challenges and a progression system. MVP project submitted to validate the RNCP Level 6 Fullstack Developer certification, built in 2 weeks as a team.
alterago.roleDetail: I served as tech lead: authentication setup (JWT), multi-step user profile creation, React Native API integration with Redux, and technical coordination across the team.

picswipe.title: PicSwipe
picswipe.description: Android mobile app for quickly sorting your photo gallery using an intuitive swipe system — swipe right to keep, left to delete. Photos are organised by month and loaded progressively from the device library. A review screen lets you confirm deletions before permanently freeing up storage. Cleaning statistics are persisted between sessions.

drg-dashboard.title: DRG Dashboard
drg-dashboard.description: A fullstack learning project built around reverse engineering: parsing the binary save files (GVAS / Unreal Engine 4 format) of the game Deep Rock Galactic to extract player statistics and display them in a web dashboard. The core is a Python parser built from scratch, decoding an undocumented binary format structure by structure — like building a translator for a language with no dictionary.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.pitch: I'm looking for a full-time role or an internship in the Paris area (hybrid). If you have a junior position, a mission, or just want to chat about a project — drop me a line.

form.name: Name
